rule_metadata.name: Contains_VBE_File
rule_metadata.author: Didier Stevens (https://DidierStevens.com)
rule_metadata.description: Detect a VBE file inside a byte sequence
rule_metadata.method: Find string starting with #@~^ and ending with ^#~@

rules.rule_text:
rule Contains_VBE_File : maldoc
{
	meta:
		author = "Didier Stevens (https://DidierStevens.com)"
		description = "Detect a VBE file inside a byte sequence"
		method = "Find string starting with #@~^ and ending with ^#~@"

	strings:
		$vbe = /#@~\^.+\^#~@/

	condition:
		$vbe
}
